orders.title: My Orders

empty.noOrdersDescription: No orders match your filters. Check your selections or reset filters to view all orders.
empty.allCaughtUpDescription: All caught up! You have no orders left to receive. Try adjusting your filters or check back later.
empty.searchNoResultsDescription: That order number doesn’t match any records. Please double-check and try again.

orders.viewInvoiceText: Access and review detailed invoice information.
orders.paymentProofText: Production will commence after payment completion.
orders.sendMessageText: Need an update or want to make changes?

detail.statusTitle: Your artwork is in the queue for evaluation.
detail.statusDescriptionPrefix: Need to make changes? You can replace your artwork before the review starts. Click “
detail.uploadSuccess: New artwork uploaded! Your previous image has been successfully replaced.
detail.itemUploadSuccess: Artwork for Item No. {number} uploaded successfully

upload.title: Upload Artwork - Item No. {number}
upload.dragAndDrop: Drag and Drop files to upload

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.paragraph1: If you approve the final proof and confirm your payment after 5:00PM, the order will be processed the next business day.
terms.paragraph2: We normally check the important details required for production. The correction of the design content, such as misspelling, is not subject to reproduction.
terms.paragraph3: In spite of the most modern printing machines, color difference of 5-10% and movement of 1-2mm on the actual sticker product should be acceptable due to mechanical tolerances.
terms.turnaroundNote: The estimated turnaround time includes printing & delivery.
terms.bumperStickerPrintNote: Bumper Sticker is printed using digital printing. The printing resolution is lower than offset printing.
terms.materialCurlNote: Due to the characteristics of the material, the sticker may curl up after time. Choose coated option to avoid this issue.
terms.cancellationBody: Order cancellations are only allowed during 'Before Production' status; once the status changes to 'In Production,' cancellations are disabled as printing has begun, so please review your order carefully beforehand.

instructions.default: Please make sure the colors and size is exactly perfect.

artworkFlow.submittedSuccess: Your requested changes have been submitted successfully.
artworkFlow.evaluatingQueue: Your revision has been received and is now queued for evaluation.
artworkFlow.chooseToProceed: You can now choose from the available options to proceed.
artworkFlow.wantToMakeChanges: Want to make changes? Click “Request Changes” before production. No edits can be made afterward.
artworkFlow.completeRemainingSteps: Artwork approved! Complete the remaining steps to proceed with printing.
artworkFlow.underEvaluation: Your artwork is currently under evaluation.
artworkFlow.reviewingNotification: We’re currently reviewing your artwork. You’ll be notified when it’s done.
artworkFlow.feedbackRevisedVersion: Please review the feedback and submit an updated version.
